methodology: Ranks only pre-existing covers_claims links where school_prediction is falsified; does not change links, verdicts, scores, or mechanisms.

missing_sources: constructed: share of declared wealth in exempt/undervalued categories (business-asset exemption, pension wrappers, life-insurance wrappers); from tax-declaration aggregates
eurostat:nrg_pc_205 (industry electricity price) — local vintage present but incomplete for preregistered cohort/period; see diagnostics.primary_coverage_audit
iea:industrial_electricity_price (band IC) — no local vintage/manual drop on disk
constructed: 1 if country-year is in an acknowledged war or immediate post-war demobilisation, else 0
constructed: binary indicator per country-year with episode start/end from policy chronologies
constructed: episode-level documented waiting time / stockout frequency
constructed: official_price / parallel_market_price; coded per episode from academic sources
constructed: per-episode product-disappearance counts or consumer-survey quality decline

constructed: OECD national accounts HH disposable income per capita real (fallback: world_bank_wdi:NY.GDP.PCAP.KD deflated). Specialist OECD SNA fetcher pending for the HH-specific series; WDI GDP-pc-constant used as v1 fallback with a known attenuation bias.
constructed: Deaton-Muellbauer expenditure-survey-based deadweight-loss estimate from quantity-rationing + parallel-price premium
constructed: dolartoday / blue-dollar / KitcoCN-style parallel market prices divided by official price; sourced from financial press archives + IMF AREAER + local-market price surveys
constructed: share of controlled-category sales occurring outside tax-registered retail channels; from local household-expenditure surveys
ine:CPI (VEN, unreliable post-2014); indec:IPC (ARG); tuik:CPI (TUR); ksh:CPI (HUN); rbz:CPI (ZWE)
Stockholm bostadsformedlingen; NYC HPD lottery data
constructed: 1 in treated city-years (Berlin 2020-2021, SF 1994 expansion post-1995, St Paul 2021+, Stockholm continuous, NYC continuous rent-stabilised expansion years); 0 in donor cities
constructed: AirDNA Airbnb listings as share of rental stock + corporate-let exemption count; official registries where available (Berlin Zweckentfremdung; SF short-term rental registry)
cEER:SAIDI (System Average Interruption Duration Index by country); bnetza:stoerungsstatistik (DEU)
constructed: DEU Atomausstieg Mar-2011 decision + final closures 2023; BEL 2003 law + 2015 amendment + 2022 reversal; DEU Kohleausstieg 2020
entsoe:generation_mix (DEU, BEL, FRA, NLD); iea:electricity_statistics; agora:energiewende_stromdaten
constructed: Crunchbase / PitchBook firm-level digital-sector revenue, aggregated to country-year mean (log). Firm-level data-gated fetcher pending.
constructed: domestic VC dollars raised as share of GDP (Invest Europe + NVCA). Fetcher pending.
constructed: fraction of digital firms that transitioned from <100 to >500 employees within the country-year window. Crunchbase / PitchBook.
constructed: share of total employment in ISIC J (information and communication). OECD STAN or ILO where available.
constructed: total VC dollars invested in digital-sector firms per country-year / number of active digital firms. Crunchbase fetcher pending.
constructed: IEA industrial electricity price series + Eurostat NRG_PC_205 (industrial electricity prices), USD/MWh constant 2020. Fetcher pending for IEA.
constructed: share of manufacturing value added from chemicals + metals + cement + paper (OECD STAN)
constructed: binary = 1 for SLV from 2022-03-27 onward; 0 for all donor countries
constructed: 1 if country uses euro as of year, 0 otherwise. Absorbed by country FE but retained for interaction robustness.
constructed: binary = 1 for SLV from 2019-06-01 onward
constructed from Ministerio de Justicia y Seguridad Pública + Cristosal detention tallies
constructed: binary = 1 for SLV from 2022-03-27 onward; 0 otherwise
constructed: Brent crude price, log, monthly. Fetcher pending (IMF PCPS or EIA).
constructed: OECD STAN VA for chemicals + basic metals + non-metallic minerals + paper (energy-intensive subset). Quarterly where available.
constructed: OECD industrial production index (IPI) by country, monthly, seasonally adjusted. OECD fetcher shipped but specific series fetch needed.

constructed: interaction of post_2021q4 dummy with country-level pre-shock gas-import share (share of primary-energy supply from imported natural gas, averaged 2018-2020). Treatment intensity continuous rather than binary.
constructed: residual from Oxford COVID stringency index carryover into 2021-2022; captures differential lockdown legacy. Fetcher pending.
constructed: compliance-cost surveys from CEPS, Bruegel, EU Regulatory Fitness reports + CRA estimates for REACH and AI Act
constructed: data-breach notification rate (GDPR); REACH-registered substances count; AI Act high-risk audits; EMA pharmacovigilance signals
constructed: event indicators (GDPR May-2018, REACH 2007 + registration deadlines 2010/2013/2018, AI Act adoption 2024, DMA/DSA 2023-2024); EU-vs-US indicator as the cross-sectional treatment
ema_fda_comparative:drug_approval_dates (historical FDA-EMA lag studies, Tufts CSDD); it_product:gdpr_feature_launch_gap (Apple, Google, Meta feature rollout deltas)
constructed: indicator = 1 for 5yr post-reform window and 15yr follow-up after sustained tariff cut

constructed: binary = 1 where state assumed operational control AND documented technocratic-autonomy reduction (staff purge, political appointment of technical managers, revenue diversion to general budget)
constructed: extractor capex / output; requires per-company annual reports for Repsol, PDVSA, YPF, Equinor
constructed: extractor headcount / physical output; per-episode
constructed: pre-treatment 5-year volume trend per episode
constructed: OECD labour force participation rate 25-54, annual.
constructed: Penn World Table 10.01 TFP index or OECD productivity where available.
